payload.answer: Update the memory to: Sam from Goldman likes early Coltrane, and mark the prior Bill Evans preference as superseded.

Prepared a replacement memory and a supersession note to avoid surfacing deleted information as current.

repair_options: Replace the old preference with the corrected one.

Keep the person identity the same unless later evidence distinguishes multiple Sams at Goldman.
